disambiguation_rules.departments: Refers to Department of Education and Department of Health and Human Services (defined in SEC. 2(3))
disambiguation_rules.secretaries: Refers to Secretary of Health and Human Services and Secretary of Education, acting jointly or through designees (defined in SEC. 2(11))

oddities.note: Section 2 is a definitions section establishing statutory meanings for 15 terms used throughout the Act, including cross-references to ESEA and other federal legislation. Multiple definitions establish composite entities (e.g., 'Departments' and 'Secretaries') representing joint authority structures.
